metadata.title: Bontera | Avahisazi & Binesazi
metadata.description: Carinan avahisazi u binesaziya cihangi. Ji ramaneke heta qedandineki, em projeyan radest dikin ku ezmanan diyar dikin u civakan veguhezinin.

hero.description: Bi 20+ salen tecrube di avahisazi, peseroka projeyan u bireveriya milkan de, em xeridaneyen xwe di her qonaxeke de bi ewlehiye, kalite u safiye pishtgiri dikin.

vision.headline: Nisenan Sibe Iro Avakirin
vision.description: Em ne tene avahiyan ava dikin. Em mirateyen mayinde diafirinin. Sozdariya me ya li ser nujeni, domdariye, u kaliteya bela bilind me kir ku em ji bo projeyen here mezin en cihane hevkare bijarte bin.

innovation.title: Nujeni Yekem
innovation.description: Teknoloji u metodolojiyeyen avahisaziye yen peserok ku standardeyen nuh en piseye danin.

heritage.title: Li Ser Miras Hatiye Avakirin
heritage.description: 25+ salen pisporive ku ji neslekan wergirtiye ji ostayan avahisaz u endezyaran.

sustainability.title: Paserokeya Berdewam
sustainability.description: Projeyen bi LEED-sertifika bi sozdariya avahisaziya sifir-karbon heta sala 2030an.

construction.title: Avahisazi
construction.description: Projeyen avahisaziya nistecihi, bazirganiye u tertiyera bi ewlehiye, kalite u peyrovkirina hisht a standarden.

restoration.title: Restorasyon & Nuvekirin
restoration.description: Restorasyona pispor a avahiyen miras u nuvevkirina nistecihi bi rezdariya temambuna mimarine.

projectManagement.title: Bireveriya Projeye
projectManagement.description: Bireveriya projeye ji destpek heta dawi ji bo xeridaneyen taybet u karsaziya bi safiye u dembendiya radesti.

realEstate.title: Peseroka Milkan
realEstate.description: Peseroka milken nistecihi u bazirganiye bi bal li ser domdariye u afirandina nirxa drezahi.

brokerage.title: Navberiya Milkan
brokerage.description: Xizmetên navberiyê yên pîşeyî ji bo kirîn, firotin û kirêkirina milkên niştecîhî û bazirganî.

consulting.title: Serwistemeni
consulting.description: Alikariya pispor li ser gengazi, plansazi, bireveriya lesch u tevliheviya rêzike.

projects.headline: Projeyen ku Ezmanan Diyar Dikin
projects.noProjects: Di ve deme de ti proje tune ye ku were xuya kirin.

showcase.headline: Kareyen Me yen Heri Nu Bibin

whyUs.headline: Serkeftin Standarda Me Ye
whyUs.description: Dema ku hun bi Bontera re hevriki dikin, hun timeke hildibijerin ku her projeyeke wek ku navuda me pe ve giredi ye dihesibinin - ji ber ku wisa ye.

quality.title: Kaliteya Bela
quality.description: Prosesen bi ISO 9001:2015 sertifika serkeftina domdar di her projeyeki de misoger dikin.

timeline.title: Radestkirina Li Ser Deme
timeline.description: 98% ji projeyen me li ser deme an jiberi radest dibin, her car.

safety.title: Ewlehi Yekem
safety.description: Qeyda ewlehiye ya pesereng bi lihevhatina OSHA u destpeskirinen bela-buhur.

testimonial.quote: Bontera ji her heviyeki derbas bu. Baldariya wan a li ser huran, pesnaziyi, u sozdariya wan a ji bo diteya me encam da avahiyeke nisane ku em pe geli serbilind in.
testimonial.name: Sarah Mitchell

news.headline: Nuvekiriyen Dawi
news.noNews: Di ve deme de ti gotareyen nuceyan tune ne ku were xuya kirin.

newsSection.title: Nuce & Biran
newsSection.empty: Di ve deme de ti gotareyen nuceyan tune ne ku were xuya kirin.

header.pressEsc: ESC bixin an li derve bixin da bigirin
header.sustainableBuildingDesc: Di avahisaziya eko-dostane de pesereng bi projeyen bi LEED-sertifika.
header.countriesOperating: Welaten ku Te de Kar Dikin

services.projectManagementDesc: Cawerniya projeye ji sereke heta dawi

cta.headline: Amade ne ku Tirsek Awarte Ava Bikin?
cta.description: Werin diteya xwe biaxivin. Timea me amade ye ku ramanene we yen mezin veguheze rastiyen mimariye.

footer.description: Bontera avahisazi u binesaziya premium radest dike bi plansaziya disiplini, pekvekirina rast, u qedandineke bela.

cta.headline: Amade ne ku Tirsek Awarte Ava Bikin?
cta.description: Ji me re bejin hun ci ava dikin. Em timeki, planeki, u pekvekirineki tinin da li ser deme u li gora standarde here bilind radest bikin.

meta.title: Der Bare Me de | Bontera GmbH
meta.description: Der bare 20+ salen tecrubey Bontera di avahisazi, peseroka projeyan u navberiya milkan de bi ewlehi, kalite u safiye ferbun.

hero.title: Serkeftina Avahisaziye Ji Sala 2004an
hero.subtitle: Bi zede ji 20 salen tecrubey di avahisazi, peseroka projeyan u navberiya milkan de, em xeridaneyen xwe di her gaveki de bi ewlehi, kalite u safiye pishtgiri dikin.

story.title: Mirateya Veguhertina Xewnan bo Rastiye
story.paragraph1: Di sala 1999an de hate damezrandin, Bontera wek sirketek avahisaziye ya biquk bi diteyeke mezin dest pe kir: veguhertina jingehe avakiri bi nujeni, rasti, u sozdariya bela ji bo serkeftine. Timekeke avahisazeren dilsoz ci dibe rehberek avahisaziye ya cihani.
story.paragraph2: Di 25 salen boriye de, me zede ji 500 projeyen nisane di 12 welatan de qedandiye, ji birceyen bazirganiye yen ikonik heta civaken nistecih en berdewam. Her proje sozdariya me ya ji bo huneremendiya kaliteye u baweriya me ku avahiyen mezin dikarin ilham bidin nisan dide.
story.paragraph3: Iro, Bontera wek xuyakirinek li ser ciki gengaz dema ku pisporbun bi meyla mezin re werin cem hev dimint. Em berdewam sinoran diperzin, teknolojiyeyen nuh hildibijerin, u standardeyen nuh di pratiken avahisaziya berdewam de daynin.
story.founderQuote: Em ne tene avahiyan ava dikin; em bingeheyen ji bo civaken pesereftine u neslen dewlemendiyi diafirinin.

mission.title: Merama Me
mission.description: Radestkirina carinan avahisaziye yen awarte ye ku ji heviyeyen xeridan derbas dibin, nujeniyi dijorin, u bi ereketi besedesteyen civaken ku em pe re xizmet dikin, dema ku standardeyen here bilind en ewlehi, kalite, u domdariye diparezin.

vision.title: Diteya Me
vision.description: Bun rehbere cihani di avahisaziya berdewam de, ku ji bo veguhertina diteyeyen mimariye yen dilsoz bo struktureyen mayinde ye ku ilham didin, xizmet dikin, u testek deme derbasker dibin nas dibin.

values.title: Nirxeyen Bingeh en Me
values.subtitle: Ev prensip her biryare ku em digirin u her projeyeke ku em dest pe dikin rehber dikin.

excellence.title: Serkeftin
excellence.description: Em di her hurik de serkeftine dijorin, ji dizayne destpeki heta radestkirina dawi, misoger dikin ku kara me wek xuyangaha kaliteye dimint.

integrity.title: Rasti
integrity.description: Em bi rastbun u zelalbuni kar dikin, baweriye bi xeridan, hevkaran, u civakan ava dikin.

innovation.title: Nujeni
innovation.description: Em teknoloji u metodolojiyeyen pesereng hildibijerin da carinan avahisaziye yen jirtir u bi bandortir radest bikin.

safety.title: Ewlehi Yekem
safety.description: Saxbuna timea me u civakan here giring e. Em standardeyen ewlehiye yen dijwar li ser her projeye didominin.

sustainability.title: Domdariye
sustainability.description: Em sozdar in pratiken berpirsiyariyi jingehe ku taybetmendiya me kembike u bandora ereketi zede bike bi cih binin.

partnership.title: Hevkari
partnership.description: Em bi peywendiyen hevkari bawer dikin, bi xeridan u aliyen eleqedar re bi nezi kar dikin da serkeftina havbeh bigihijin.

founding.title: Destpek
founding.description: Bontera bi diteyeke ji bo veguhertina piseya avahisaziye bi nujeni u sozdariya bela ji bo kaliteye hate damezrandin.

expansion.title: Berfireh buna Heremi
expansion.description: Karguzeriye li seranser Rojhilata Navin berfireh bun, hevkariyen serekin ava bun u projeya me ya yekem a bazirganiye ya mezin qediyan.

international.title: Bun Cihani
international.description: Ketina bazareyen Ewrupa u Asyaye, destpeka hebuna me ya navnetewi bi ofisenki di 5 welaten nuh de nisan da.

sustainability.title: Rehberiya Domdariye
sustainability.description: Destpeskirina me ya domdariyi ya berfireh hate danin, sertifikaya LEED hate stendin u sozdariya karguzariyeyen karbon-betal heta sala 2030an hate dayyin.

digital.title: Veguhertina Dijital
digital.description: Teknolojiya BIM ya pesreftir u bireveriya projeyan bi AI-ajotin hate bicih kirin, prosesene me yen avahisaziye veguhestin.

future.title: Avahikirina Sibe
future.description: Berdewamkirina nujeniya bi teknolojiyeyen avahiya jir u berfirehkirina portfolioya me ya avahisaziya berdewam li seranser cihane.

leadership.title: Rehbereyen Me Nas Bikin
leadership.subtitle: Pisporeen bi tecrube ku diteya Bontera ya serkeftine di avahisaziye de dijonin.

certifications.title: Sertifikayan & Akkreditasyonan
certifications.description: Sozdariya me ya ji bo serkeftine bi sertifikayeyen navnetewi naskirine u akkreditasyoneyen pisey ku standarden here bilind di kalite, ewlehi, u berpirsiyariya jingehe de misoger dikin, pejirand dibe.

global.title: Avahikirin Li Seranser Sinoran
global.description: Ji ezmanen bilind en Dubai heta kolanene dirokiye yen Ewrupa, pisporiya Bontera qareyan derbas dike. Hebuna me ya cihani dem dide me ku selihiyeten avahisaziye yen cihan-class li her projeyan binin.

cta.title: Amade ne ku Tirsek Awarte Ava Bikin?
cta.description: Gelo hun pesereftinek bazirganiye, projeyek binesaziye, an avahiyeke berdewam plan dikin, timea me amade ye ku diteya we bo jiyane bine.

meta.title: Xizmeten Me | Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Xizmeten avahisaziya temam ya Bontera bibinin tev avahisaziya bazirganiye, nistecih, binesazi, piseyi, nuvekirin, u carinan serwistemeniye.

hero.title: Carinan Avahisaziye Temam
hero.subtitle: Ji ramane heta qedandine, em xizmeten avahisaziye ji sere heta dawi radest dikin ku li gora diteya u pewisteyen we yene awarte kirin.

overview.title: Avahikirina Serkeftine Li Seranser Her Sektore
overview.description: Bi zede ji 25 salen tecrubey, Bontera pisporiya kur di sektoreyen avahisaziye yen ciyas de pesxistiye. Nerda me ya yekbui dizayne nujeni, endezyariya rast, u pratiken berdewam dike yek da projeyen ku heviyane derbas dikin radest bikin.

expertise.title: Pisporiya Piseyi ya Kur
expertise.description: Zanina taybeti li seranser sektoreyen bazirganiye, nistecih, u binesaziye.

quality.title: Kaliteya Bela
quality.description: Kontrola kaliteye ya dijwar di her qonaga avahisaziye de.

innovation.title: Carinan Nujeni
innovation.description: Teknolojiya pesereng u metodet avahisaziye yen nujen.

safety.title: Serkeftina Ewlehiye
safety.description: Standardet u protokolen ewlehiye yen pesereng di piseye de.

mainServices.title: Em Ci Peskesin
mainServices.subtitle: Xizmeten avahisaziye yen temam ku ji bo diteya we bo jiyane binin hatine diyarin.

commercial.title: Avahisaziya Bazirganiye
commercial.description: Ji birceyen ofise yen ikonik heta cihaken firotin en dinamik, em jingehen bazirganiye diafirinin ku hilberdariye ilham didin, serkeftina kare dijonin, u wek nisaneyen di dorbereke bajaran de diminin.

realEstate.title: Pêşveçûna Milkê
realEstate.description: Afirandina veberhênanan milkê yên awarte bi pêşvebirina stratejîk a milkên nîştecihi, bazirganî û bi karanîna tev bi nirxa demdirêj.

real-estate.title: Pêşveçûna Milkê
real-estate.description: Afirandina veberhênanan milkê yên awarte bi pêşvebirina stratejîk a milkên nîştecihi, bazirganî û bi karanîna tev bi nirxa demdirêj.

residential.title: Avahisaziya Nistecih
residential.description: Afirandina mal u civakeyen ku malbat te de pesereft dibin, ji xaniyen luks heta peserokene nistecih en berdewam ku jiyane nujen diyar dikin.

industrial.title: Avahisaziya Piseyi
industrial.description: Dizaynkirin u avahikirina tesisen piseyi ku karguzariyan optimize dikin, bandoriye zede dikin, u pewisteyen dijwar en hilberina nujen pir dikin.

renovation.title: Nuvekirin & Restorasyon
renovation.description: Dayina jiyane nuh bo struktureyen heyi bi nuvekirinek bihezman, parastina diroki, u biker-veguhertine ku boriye di bin rumetde digire dema ku pasiroke hildibijere.

consulting.title: Xizmeten Serwistemeniye
consulting.description: Alikariya pispor di her qonaga projeya we de, ji likolinen gengazi u tahminkirina liraje heta nirxandina metirsiye u lihevhatina biryarname.

process.title: Prosesa Me ya Selih
process.subtitle: Nerineke sistemati ku kalite, bandori, u zelalbuniye di her qonage de misoger dike.

discovery.title: Vedibinin & Plansazi
discovery.description: Em bi fahimkirina diteya we, pewisteyan, u sinoran dest pe dikin da planeke projeyeke temam pesxin.

planning.title: Dizayn & Endezyari
planning.description: Timeyen me yen pispor dizayn u planeyen endezyariye yen berbereki diafirinin ku diteya we bo jiyane tinin.

execution.title: Avahisazi & Pekvekirine
execution.description: Hosteyen jir u teknolojiya pesreftir digihijin yek da kaliteyeke avahisaziye ya awarte radest bikin.

delivery.title: Radestkirine & Pilani
delivery.description: Testkirina berbereki, radestkirine, u pilania berdewam razibuna we ya temam misoger dike.

industries.eyebrow: Piseyen ku Em pe Xizmet Dikin
industries.title: Pispori Li Seranser Sektoran
industries.description: Portfolioya me ya ciyas sektoreyen pir derbas dike, ku her yek pewisteyen taybet heye ku zanina taybeti u carinan li gora daxwazan pesdixin.

technology.title: Avahikirin bi Teknolojiya Sibe
technology.description: Em teknolojiya pesereng biker dikin da bandoriye zede bikin, kalite pesxin, u encameyen bashtir ji bo xeridaneyen me radest bikin.

bim.title: Teknolojiya BIM
bim.description: Modela Agahiya Avahiye ji bo plansazi, koordinasyon, u xuyakirineke rast di seranser jiyana projeye de.

drones.title: Pirmasiya bi Drone
drones.description: Pirmasiya hewai u sewqandin ji bo nirxandina cihan rast u sewqandina pesereftine di deme rast de.

prefab.title: Prefabrikasyon
prefab.description: Hilberina parceyen avahiye li derve cihe ji bo avahisaziyeke bilez, bi bandortir, u bi kaliteya bilindtir.

iot.title: IoT & Avahiyen Jir
iot.description: Sistemet gireday u senzor ji bo bireveriya avahiye ya jir u bandoriya karguzariye.

cta.title: Amade ne ku Projeya Xwe Dest Pe Bikin?
cta.description: Werin biaxivin cawa Bontera dikare diteya we bo jiyane bine bi carinan avahisaziye yen me yen temam.

meta.title: Projeyen Me | Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Portfolioya projeyen avahisaziye yen nisane ya Bontera bibinin ku sektoreyen bazirganiye, nistecih, binesazi, u piseyi li 12 welatan derbas dike.

hero.title: Projeyen Nisane ku Ezmanan Diyar Dikin
hero.subtitle: Portfolioya me ya ciyas a projeyen qediyayi u berdewam bibinin ku sozdariya me ya ji bo serkeftin, nujeni, u avahisaziya berdewam nisan dide.

featured.title: Projeyen Imza
featured.description: Projeyen me yen here bandodar ku selihiyet u sozdariya me ya ji bo serkeftine di avahisaziye de nisan didin.

noProjects.title: Ti Proje Nehat Ditin
noProjects.description: Me nekaribu ti projeyeyen ku li gora piveranene we bin bibinin.

commercial.title: Bazirganiye
commercial.description: Birceyen ofise, navendeen firotin, otelen, u peserokene bi karanina tev ku serkeftina kare dijonin.

residential.title: Nistecih
residential.description: Xaniyen luks, kompleksen apartemaniye, u civaken plan-serekin ku malbat te de pesereft dibin.

realEstate.title: Binesazi
realEstate.description: Pir, otostradan, balafirgehan, u kargehi ku civakan giredidin u enerjiye didin.

industrial.title: Piseyi
industrial.description: Tesisen hilberine, embar, u navendeen logistiki ku ji bo bandoriye hatine optimize kirin.

renovation.title: Nuvekirin
renovation.description: Projeyen parastina diroki u modernkirine ku boriye di bin rumetde digire dema ku pasiroke hildibijere.

publicWorks.title: Kareyen Gisti
publicWorks.description: Avahiyen hukumet, navendeen siviki, u tesisen gisti ku civakan xizmet dikin.

cta.title: Amade ne ku Diteya Xwe Ava Bikin?
cta.description: Gelo hun pesereftinek bazirganiye, civakek nistecih, an projeyek binesaziye plan dikin, timea me amade ye ku diteya we bo jiyane bine.

meta.title: Bi Me Re Tekili Daynin | Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Bi Bontera Avahisazi re tekili daynin. Seredana ofisenene me li Dubai, Riyadh, Qahire, u London bikin, an peyameke ji me re bisepin da projeya xwe ya avahisaziye biaxivin.

hero.title: Werin Tirsek Mezin Bi Hevra Ava Bikin
hero.subtitle: Projeyek di hizra we de heye? Timea me amade ye ku alkariya we bike da diteya we bo jiyane bine. Bi riya her yek ji kanalene me yen li jeri bi me re tekili daynin.

email.label: Ji Me Re Email Bikin
email.description: Em di 24 seetadi de bersiv didin

form.title: Em Cawa Dikarin Alikariya We Bikin?
form.description: Forma li jeri dagirin u timea me di 24 seetadi de bersive we dide.

message.label: Peyama We
message.placeholder: Der bare projeya xwe, pewisteyan, demname, u her hurayen din ku dikarin alkariye bikin da pewisteyen we fahim bikin ji me re bejin...

errors.nameRequired: Ji kerema xwe nave xwe binivisin
errors.emailRequired: Ji kerema xwe navnisana email xwe binivisin
errors.emailInvalid: Ji kerema xwe navnisaneke email drust binivisin
errors.messageRequired: Ji kerema xwe peyama xwe binivisin
errors.messageTooShort: Peyama we divit bi kembasi 20 tip be

privacy.text: Bi seperandina ve forme, hun bi

success.title: Peyam bi Serkefti Hat Sepedrme!
success.message: Spas ji bo tekilidayina me. Timea me peyama we dixwine u di 24 seetadi de bersive we dide.

error.title: Tirsek Xelet Derket
error.message: Me nekaribu peyama we bisepin. Ji kerema xwe disa biceribewin an bi riya telefon an email rasterast bi me re tekili daynin.

responseTime.title: Bersiva Bilez Garantiye
responseTime.description: Timea me bi girant di 24 seetadi de di rojen kare de bersiv dide. Ji bo kareyen lez, ji kerema xwe xeta me ya rewseke lez biker bikin.

offices.title: Seredana Ofisenene Me Bikin
offices.description: Bi ofiseneme li seranser Rojhilata Navin u Ewrupa, em tim li nezi projeya we ne.

faq.title: Pirseyen ku Pircar Diken
faq.description: Bersiveyen bilez li pirseyen hevpar der bare karkirina bi Bontera re bibinin.

timeline.question: Projeyek avahisaziye bi giranke cend dem digire?
timeline.answer: Demnameyen projeyan li gora dorme u pirgirviye diguherrin. Nuvekirinek bazirganiye ya biquk dikare 3-6 mehan bigire, dema ku pesereftinek mezin dikare 2-3 salan bidominin. Di serleheya me ya destpeki de, em demnameyeke berbereki ku taybeti projeya we ye peskesin.

budget.question: Hun cawa bihayen projeyan u tahminkirina liraje birevin dikin?
budget.answer: Em di qonaga plansaziye de tahminkirinene liraje yen zelal, berbereki peskesin. Timea me nermalava tahminkirine ya pesreftir u daneyeyen diroki biker dike da rastbune misoger bike. Em jibo vebijarkene endezyariya nirke jibo optimizekirina liraje bela hevgirtina kaliteye peskesin.

process.question: Prosesa bireveriya projeyen we ci ye?
process.answer: Prosesa me ya 4-qonag ya selih Vedibinin & Plansazi, Dizayn & Endezyari, Avahisazi & Pekvekirine, u Radestkirine & Pilani digire. Her qonageki qonagiyen zelal heye, u bireverek projeyek we wek xala tekilidayina yek were ji sere heta dawi.

warranty.question: Hun ci garantiyan li projeyen qediyayi peskesin?
warranty.answer: Em li seranser hemu kara me garantiyen temam peskesin. Henceyen strukturi 10 sal, sistemeyen mekaniki u elektrik 5 sal, u huneremendiya gisti 2 sal teni dagirin. Vebijareyen garantiye ya direjkiri jibo heye.

map.placeholder: Nexseya interaktiv li vir were xuya kirin
map.visitUs: Seredana Navenda Me ya Serekin Bikin

meta.title: Kariyer | Bibe Endam Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Kariyera xwe bi Bontera re ava bikin. Derfeyen heyecan di avahisazi, endezyari, bireveriya projeyan, u zede li seranser ofisene me yen cihani bibinin.

hero.title: Pasiroke Xwe Bi Me Re Ava Bikin
hero.subtitle: Bibe endam timekeke pisporene dilsoz ku ezmanan diyar dikin u civakan li seranser cihane ava dikin. Derfeya we ya mezin te hat intizar dike.

whyJoin.title: Cima Kariyera Xwe Li Vir Ava Bikin?
whyJoin.description: Li Bontera, em bawer dikin ku mirovene me sermaniya me ya here mezin in. Em sozdar in ku jingeyeke ku zebuhati te de pesereft dibe, nujeni te de gesedibe, u her endamek time dikare potansiyeleke xwe ya temam bigihit biafirinin.

impact.title: Bandoreke Rast Bikin
impact.description: Li ser projeyen nisane ku civakan diyar dikin u mirateke mayinde dihelin kar bikin.

growth.title: Pesxistina Berdewam
growth.description: Gihistina rahenandin, bernameyeyen mentoriye, u rehene kariyereyen zelal.

team.title: Timea Hevkar
team.description: Bibe endam timekeke ciyas, pilani ku serkeftinan bi hevra pirozbahi dike.

innovation.title: Nujeni Yekem
innovation.description: Bi teknolojiya pesereng u metodet avahisaziye yen peserok kar bikin.

benefits.title: Em Li Timea Xwe Meraq Dikin
benefits.subtitle: Paketa feydeyan temam ku saxlemani, dewlemendi, u hevsengiya kar-jiyan pilani dike.

health.title: Saxlemani & Bexteri
health.description: Dagirtina pizski, diranan, u diten temam ji bo we u malbata we, herwiha bernameyeyen bexteriyi u endametiya jimnastikan.

retirement.title: Planeyen Teqawtbune
retirement.description: Planeyen pasinena teqawtbune yen peskesker bi lihevhatina sirkete da pasirokeke we ya daravi ewle bike.

learning.title: Ferbunn & Pesereftine
learning.description: Derfeyen ferbunn yen berdewam tev sertifikayan, konferansan, u bernameyeyen vegerandina xerciye rahenandin.

vacation.title: Dema Betlane ya Comerd
vacation.description: Siyaseta PTO ya lekev, rojene betlane yen bi muzde, u derfeyen sabbatical da venuvinim u vekolim bikin.

flexibility.title: Lekeviya Kar
flexibility.description: Aranjmaneyene kar en lekev u vebijareyen karkirina ji dure da alkariya we bikin ku hevsengiya kar-jiyan bidominin.

growth.title: Pesereftina Kariyere
growth.description: Rehene kariyereyen zelal, bernameyeyen mentoriye, u derfeyen pesereftine li seranser karguzariyene me yen cihani.

culture.title: Jiyan li Bontera
culture.description: Em kultureke serkeftin, hevkari, u pesxistina berdewam didominin ku her deng giring e.

innovation.title: Nujeni
innovation.description: Em ramanene nuh u teknolojiya pesereng hildibijerin da carinan bashtir radest bikin.

teamwork.title: Kara Time
teamwork.description: Hevkari li navina her tirseke ku em dikin e, nerinene ciyas pirozbahi dike.

excellence.title: Serkeftin
excellence.description: Em xwe li gora standardeyen here bilind di her projeyeke ku em dest pe dikin de digirin.

safety.title: Ewlehi Yekem
safety.description: Saxbuna timea me u civakan herdem prioriteya me ya here mezin e.

quotes.engineer: Bune endam Bontera biryara kariyere here baş bu ku min da. Proje dijwar in, time pilani ye, u tim cihe pesxistine heye. Min li vir derfeyen ku min ti car neditin hebun.
quotes.manager: Tirsa ku ez here ji Bontera hez dikim kultura hevkariye ye. Her kes ji rehberiya mezin heta endam nuh li hember armanjen havbeh kar dikin. Bi rasti wek malbateke his dike.
quotes.architect: Dome u pirgirviya projeyan li Bontera tu lihevhatiye tune ye. Min karibu li ser avahiyen nisane ku ji bo neslan diminin kar bikim. Zor xwes e ku diteya xwe ezmanen bajaran diyar dike bibinin.

noJobs.title: Ti Pozisyon Nehat Ditin
noJobs.description: Me nekaribu ti pozisyoneyek ku li gora piveranene we bin bibinin. Filtereyen xwe bigjerin an zudi ji bo naveroka nuh vegerrin.

cta.title: Rola Rast Nabinin?
cta.description: Em tim li donalene bi zebuhati digerin ku bibe endam timea me. Resumeya xwe ji me re bisepin u em we ji bo derfeyen pasiroke bi bir dikin.

meta.title: Nuce & Biran | Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Bi nuceyen dawi, ragihandinene projeyan, biraneyen piseyi, u nuvekirinan sirkete ya Bontera ji seranser karguzariyene me yen cihani biminin nuhati.

hero.title: Cirokene ku Sibe Ava Dikin
hero.subtitle: Bi nuvekirinan dawi ji Bontera biminin agahdar, tev qonagiyen projeyan, trendene piseyi, u ragihandinene sirkete.

featured.title: Sername Dawi
featured.description: Nuvekirin u ragihandinene here giring ji seranser karguzariyene me yen cihani.

news-001.title: Bontera $2.5 Milyar Peymannameya Binesaziya NEOM Qezenc Kir
news-001.excerpt: Di serkeftineke nisane de, Bontera wek peymankere serekin ji bo pesereftineke binesaziye ya mezin di nav mega-projeya NEOM de hat hilbijartin, peymana me ya here mezin heta nuke nisan dide.

news-002.title: 10 Trendene Avahisaziya Berdewam ku Sala 2024e Diyar Dikin
news-002.excerpt: Ji materyaleyen karbon-betal heta bireveriya avahiye bi AI-ajotin, nujeniyeyen ku veguhezinin cawa em ji bo paserokeye berdewamtir ava dikin bibinin.

news-003.title: Birceka Marina Sertifikaya LEED Platinum Stendin
news-003.excerpt: Pesereftina me ya bi karanina tev ya flagship nivra domdariye ya here bilind stendin, sozdariya Bontera ya ji bo avahisaziya berpirsiyar a jingehe nisan dide.

news-004.title: Bontera Xelata Serkeftina Avahisaziye ya 2024e Werdigire
news-004.excerpt: Xelata piseyi ya girank nerda me ya nujeni ji bo radestkirina projeyan u sozdariya kaliteye li seranser portfolioya me nas dike.

news-005.title: Navenda Heremi ya Nuh li Riyadh Vebe
news-005.excerpt: Berfirehkirina hebuna me li Erebistana Suudi, ofisa nuh wek navend ji bo karguzariyene me yen pesereft di projeyen Diteh 2030e ya Padisahiye de xizmet dike.

news-006.title: Encameyen Serekin ji Konferansa Binesaziye ya Cihani ya 2024e
news-006.excerpt: Timea me biranan ji buye ya pesereng a piseye parbehs dike, ku teknolojiyeyen pesereng, trendene vermayise, u derfeyen hevkari digire.

news-007.title: Yekkirina Teknolojiya Avahiya Jir: Rehberek Pratik
news-007.excerpt: Ferbin cawa em senzoret IoT, sistemeyen otomatik, u bireveriya bi AI-ajotin di projeyen avahisaziya nujen de biker dikin.

news-008.title: Merasima Destpekkirine ji bo Kompleksa Tenderustiye ya $400M
news-008.excerpt: Avahisazi fermii li ser tesisa pizski ya pesereng dest pe dike ku ze ji 2 milyon runistanet di navceya metropole de xizmet bike.

news-009.title: Bontera Sozdariya Karbon-Betaliye bo Sala 2030an Dide
news-009.excerpt: Nexseya reya domdariye ya me ya temam gaveyen ku em digirin da emmisyonene sifir-net li seranser hemu karguzariyan bigihijin nisan dide.

news-010.title: Hevkariyek Stratejik bi Sirketek Mimariye ya Cihani
news-010.excerpt: Hevkari pisporiya dizayne ya cihan-class bo projeyen me li seranser Rojhilata Navin u Bakure Afrikaye tine.

news-011.title: Ronahiya Karmendan: Stareyen Me yen Janviye Nas Bikin
news-011.excerpt: Pirozbahiya endamene time yen awarte yen ku di ve mehe de ji normali derbas bun, zebuhati ku serkeftina Bontera diajo nisan dide.

news-012.title: Nujeniyen Teknolojiya Ewlehiya Cihde Avahisaziye
news-012.excerpt: Lekolina teknolojiyeyen libasne, sistemeyen sewqandine, u serirastekirinene AI yen dawi ku cihdene kara me ji her deme ewletir dikin.

noArticles.title: Ti Gotare Nehat Ditin
noArticles.description: Me nekaribu ti gotareyan di ve kategoriye de bibinin. Kategoriyeke cuda hilbijerin an zudi ji bo naveroka nuh vegerrin.

newsletter.title: Subscribe Rojnameya Me Bikin
newsletter.description: Nuce, nuvekirinene projeyan, u biraneyen piseyi yen dawi rasterast bo inbox a we bibin.
newsletter.privacy: Em nihenitiyi we rumet dikin. Her deme unsubscribe bikin.

media.title: Pirseyen Medyaye
media.description: Ji bo pirseyen capa, daxwaziyeyen hevpeyivine, an careseriyeyen medyaye, timea ragihandina me amade ye ku alkariya we bike.
media.featuredIn: Li Te de Hat Xuya Kirin

meta.title: Bihayeke Bixwazin | Bontera Avahisazi
meta.description: Ji bo projeya xwe ya avahisaziye bihayeke belahe, bela-sozdar bibin. Der bare diteya xwe de ji me re bejin u timea me di 48 seetadi de peskesenke berbereki pesdixe.

hero.title: Bihayeke Xwe ya Belahe Bixwazin
hero.subtitle: Der bare projeya xwe de ji me re bejin u peskesenke berbereki, li gora we ya taylandi ji timea me ya pispor bibin. Bela sozdar, bela heqen vesite.

form.title: Der Bare Projeya Xwe de ji Me Re Bejin
form.description: Forma li jeri dagirin u timea me bihayeke berbereki ku li gora pewisteyen we yen taybeti hatiye taylandin amade dike.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Ji kerema xwe projeya xwe bi berbereki ravebkin, tev dorme, armancan, u her pewisteyen taybeti...
fields.referralSource: We cawa der bare me de bihist?

privacy.text: Bi seperandina ve forme, hun bi

errors.invalidEmail: Ji kerema xwe navnisaneke email drust binivisin
errors.descriptionTooShort: Ji kerema xwe bi kembasi 50 tipeyan peskesin

success.title: Daxwaza Biha Hat Sepedrme!
success.message: Spas ji bo eleqa we bi Bontera. Timea me hurayen projeya we dixwine u di 48 seetadi de bi peskesneke taylandi bi we re tekili digire.

error.title: Seperandin Serniket
error.message: Me nekaribu daxwaza we pekve bikin. Ji kerema xwe disa biceribewin an rasterast bi me re tekili daynin.

contact.title: Biaxivin Hezdikint?
contact.description: Timea me amade ye ku projeya we rasterast biaxivin.

process.title: Ji Pirseyeke bo Peskesneke
process.description: Prosesa me ya sade misoger dike ku hun bihayeke temam, rast bilez bibin.

submit.title: Daxwaza Xwe Bisepin
submit.description: Forma me ya berbereki bi agahiya projeya xwe u pewisteyan dagirin.

review.title: Em Dixwinin & Analiz Dikin
review.description: Pisporene me seperandina we dixwinin u pewisteyen projeye analiz dikin.

consultation.title: Serleheya Destpeki
consultation.description: Em bangeke daninin da hurayen biaxivin u pirsen we bersiv bidin.

proposal.title: Peskesneka Xwe Bibin
proposal.description: Peskesnekeke berbereki, taylandi bi bihayiriyeke zelal bibin.

faq.title: Pirseyen Hevpar Der Bare Bihayan de
faq.description: Bersiveyen pirseyen ku pircar dikin der bare prosesa bihayaen me de bibinin.

stillQuestions.title: Hina pirsen heye?
stillQuestions.description: Timea me li vir e ku alikariye bike. Ji bo alikariya kesane bi me re tekili daynin.
stillQuestions.link: Bi Timea Me Re Tekili Daynin

timeline.question: Bihayeke bi giranke cend dem digire ku bibin?
timeline.answer: Em bi girant bihayeyen destpeki di 48 seetadi de pirti daxwaza we peskesin. Ji bo projeyen pirgirviye ku analiza berbereki pesdixe, em bi we re tekili digirin da heviyeyen demname biaxivin.

cost.question: Heqek heye ji bo bidestxistina bihayeke?
cost.answer: Na, bihayeyen me bi temamiyi belahe ne bela sozdar. Em bi ragihandina zelal bawer dikin u dixwazin ku hemu agahiya ku pesdixe hebin da biryareke agahdar bidin.

included.question: Di bihaye de ci heye?
included.answer: Bihayeyen me daberkirina liraje ya berbereki, demname projeye, dorme kare, taybetmendiyen materyalan, u sertan deyn digirin. Em jibo agahiya der bare desturen, sigmarta, u dagirtina garantiye jibo peskesin.

changes.question: Ez dikarim pirti bidestxistina bihayeke guhertinan bikim?
changes.answer: Bi tekusi. Em fahim dikin ku pewisteyen projeyan dikarin biguherin. Em kefxwes in ku bihayeyen li gora taybetmendiyen nuhati an guhertinan dorme bela heqe zede nuvekin.

testimonial.quote: Prosesa bihaye zor sade bu. Timea Bontera wext dan ku pewisteyen me yen taybet fahim bikin u peskesnekeke berbereki, zelal peskesin ku baweriya temam da me ku berdewam bikin.
testimonial.author: Mohammad Al-Farsi

cta.title: Amade ne ku Projeya Xwe Dest Pe Bikin?
cta.description: Bibe endam sedan xeridenen razi ku Bontera ji bo pewisteyen avahisaziya xwe hilbijart.

cta.title: Balkêşiya projeyek wekhev?
cta.description: Ka em nîqaş bikin ka em çawa dikarin dîtina we zindî bikin.

cta.title: Amade ne ku Dîtina Xwe Ava Bikin?
cta.description: Tîma me amade ye ku ramanên we veguherîne rastiyê. Ka îro li ser projeya xwe nîqaş bikin.

meta.description: بۆ ئەم دەرفەتە کارە سەرنجڕاکێشە لە Bontera Construction داواکاری بکە.

sidebar.contactText: تیمی دەستنیشانکردنمان ئامادەیە یارمەتیت بدات. پەیوەندیمان پێوە بکە بۆ هەر پرسیارێک سەبارەت بەم پۆستە.

apply.title: بۆ ئەم پۆستە داواکاری بکە
apply.subtitle: فۆڕمەکەی خوارەوە پڕبکەرەوە بۆ ناردنی داواکاریەکەت. ئێمە پێداچوونەوەی دەکەین و زوو پەیوەندیت پێوە دەکەین.

fields.resumeHint: فایلەکەت ڕابکێشە بۆ ئێرە یان کلیک بکە بۆ گەڕان
fields.coverLetterPlaceholder: پێمان بڵێ بۆچی حەزت لەم ڕۆڵە هەیە و چیت دەکاتە کەسێکی گونجاو...

privacy.text: ڕازیم بە پرۆسێسکردنی داتاکانی کەسییەکەم لەگەڵ
